creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 231326
py-horizon-20.2.0.patch

Hi Sunpoet,

attached is the patch that updates www/py-horizon to 20.2.0. This release also adds support for Django 3.2.

A side note:
~~~~~~~~~~~~
- Although devel/py-six seems superfluous it's listed in the "requirements.txt".

QA:
~~~
- poudriere -> OK (12.2-RELEASE amd64, py37, py38, py39, py310)
